response.justification: Wei Chen is a strong senior full-stack engineer with roughly 19 years of hands-on experience, satisfying the raw tenure requirement, and shows entrepreneurial initiative through founding GISCollective. However, the role is a Director-level Principal Engineer focused on AI strategy, and the resume shows no recognized AI expertise, no AI-powered products or platforms at scale, no advanced AI-related degree, and no evidence of organization-level technical leadership, strategic advisory work, or industry influence. Recent MCP/agentic tooling exposure is promising but too shallow and recent for a principal AI strategy mandate.
strengths: 19+ years of broad engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput systems
Founder experience (GISCollective) demonstrating entrepreneurial drive and product ownership
Active knowledge-sharing via conference talks, workshops, and open-source projects
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML depth or recognized AI expertise; only recent, light exposure to AI-agent tooling
Career trajectory is senior/staff IC delivery work, not director-level strategy or engineering leadership
Limited cloud platform strategy experience; no advanced degree in an AI-related field

key_factors.factor: Lack of AI expertise and AI-built products
Seniority gap vs. director-level strategic role
Meets 15-year experience minimum with broad technical range
